regime_justification: USDJPY hovering at 160.39 (18 pips below MOF watch-line 160.60), JGB 10Y at 2.67%, BOJ widely expected to hike June 16, oil easing -3.9% to $87.67, but spread still wide at 187 bps and vol low—intervention risk elevated yet carry not yet unwinding.

domino_stage.label: Pre-Intervention
domino_stage.justification: USDJPY at 160.39 with markets pricing 80% chance of BOJ hike June 16; MOF vigilance high after foreign reserve depletion in May; JGB yield spike to 2.67% signals bond market stress; oil pull-back buys time but ¥-import pressure remains elevated.

1w.label: Watchful
1w.driver: BOJ meeting June 16 (6 days out) priced at 80% hike probability; USDJPY 18 pips from 160.60 watch-line; oil easing provides temporary relief but JGB yields spiking and FX vol still subdued—setup fragile.

2w.label: Watchful
2w.driver: Post-BOJ June 16 reaction window; hike likely but pace of subsequent tightening unclear; US CPI June 11 could reignite USD strength if hot; MOF intervention or BOJ disappointed market both tail risks.

3w.label: Watchful
3w.driver: BOJ decision in rear-view but market testing resolve; if hike underwhelms or USD strength persists, USDJPY retest of 160+ likely; oil trajectory and Hormuz closure still wildcard; carry unwind scenario probability rising if JGB instability continues.

4w.label: Unlikely
4w.driver: If BOJ delivers June hike and oil remains sub-$90, pressure moderates; spread compression and vol normalization would stabilize carry; absent policy surprise or geopolitical flare-up, unwind risk lower by early July.

bottom_line: USDJPY at 160.39—18 pips below MOF line—markets pricing 80% BOJ hike June 16; oil easing to $87.67 buys time but JGB yields hit 2.67% (2-week high) and FX vol still subdued at ~7%; carry-to-vol 26.7 (elevated), spread 187 bps. Stage-2 Pre-Intervention: setup fragile, catalyst inside 6 days, but carry not yet unwinding. Grades C/C/C/D reflect BOJ meeting as inflection; if hike lands and oil stays soft, risk moderates by July. Watch June 11 US CPI and June 16 BOJ for grade shift. BTC -2.4% to $61,597; crypto liquidity draining on risk-off positioning ahead of vol event.

trigger_map.note: 80% probability priced; if delivers 25 bp to 1.0% and signals accelerated tightening, USDJPY could gap lower 200+ pips; key catalyst inside 6 days
USDJPY 160.39, 18 pips from watch-line; May reserves fell record amount; rate-checks likely if breaks 160.60 or post-BOJ spike above 161

Oil easing to $87.67, ¥/bbl 14,050; Iran-Israel pause holding; dormant unless ceasefire breaks

narrative.p1: USDJPY 160.39, up 0.02% but holding 18 pips below the 160.60 MOF watch-line; oil plunged 3.9% to $87.67 on Iran-Israel pause, easing ¥-import pressure to 14,050 ¥/bbl. JGB 10Y spiked 4 bp to 2.67% (2-week high) as BOJ signals further bond-purchase taper ahead of June 16 meeting; markets pricing 80% probability of 25 bp hike to 1.0%. US 10Y eased to 4.52% after CPI showed 4.2% YoY (in line) with core MoM 0.2% (undershoot). VIX jumped 6.7% to 20.18 on pre-CPI/pre-BOJ caution; equity weakness (Nikkei -1.9%, S&P -0.3%) reflects tech rotation and BOJ uncertainty. No change in domino stage from yesterday's yellow; Stage-2 Pre-Intervention setup intact—BOJ meeting is the 6-day catalyst.
narrative.p2: Quant anchors: US-JP spread 187 bps (down 20 from yesterday on JGB spike), carry-to-vol proxy 26.7 (187 / ~7% implied vol)—elevated ratio signals complacency in hedging vs rich carry reward. USDJPY pace muted (+0.02% 1d, +0.58% 5d) but level critical; 18 pips from MOF line and May foreign reserve data showed record depletion. Oil pull-back is Stage-0 tailwind but temporary—Hormuz still 90-95% closed, tanker traffic dark. Applied unwind prior: ambiguous BOJ setup (80% hike priced but pace unclear, JGB instability rising) leans C over D for weeks 1-3; would grade D if oil sustained sub-$85 and JGB stable. Without prior: 1w=D (catalyst not yet firing), 2w=C (BOJ aftermath), 3w=D (post-hike stabilization), 4w=D. With prior (tiebreaker on fragile setup): C/C/C/D. Stage-2 justified: USDJPY at watch-line, 80% hike priced (intervention/surprise both plausible), JGB 2.67% elevated, vol bid but not spiking, oil easing but geopolitical tail intact—Pre-Intervention markers present, Shock/Trigger not yet firing.
narrative.p3: BTC -2.4% to $61,597, consolidating $60-64k range; 7-day decline -17% signals crypto liquidity draining ahead of macro vol event. ETF outflows $1.7B last week (IBIT leading), open interest flat—no new leverage entering. BTC-DXY correlation weakly positive (DXY -0.01% today), suggesting crypto trading as risk-off rather than dollar hedge. XRP not retrieved but altcoin sympathy likely weak. Crypto positioning message: de-risk ahead of June 11 CPI and June 16 BOJ; if BOJ hikes and USDJPY gaps lower, BTC could test $58k on carry-unwind reflexivity (liquidation cascade from yen-funded crypto longs). If BOJ underwhelms and carry stabilizes, $64k resistance in play. Current setup: wait for BOJ catalyst, no chase.

horizon_rationale.w1_w2: Week-1 C reflects BOJ June 16 meeting (6 days out) as dominant catalyst; 80% hike priced but reaction function uncertain—hawkish hike + accelerated tightening signal could trigger USDJPY gap lower and MOF intervention. Oil easing buys time but JGB 2.67% and subdued FX vol (7%) suggest market not pricing tail risk. US CPI June 11 could reignite USD strength if hot. Week-2 C extends caution into post-BOJ aftermath; if hike lands but guidance dovish, USDJPY retests 160+; if hike disappoints, carry extends and unwind deferred. Carry-to-vol 26.7 elevated = complacency.
horizon_rationale.w2_w3: Week-2 C (post-BOJ reaction) vs Week-3 C (market testing BOJ resolve): if BOJ hikes 25 bp but signals pause, USDJPY could retest 160-161 range as market tests commitment; JGB instability (2.67% today, watch 2.8% break) risk persists. Oil trajectory critical—if Hormuz ceasefire holds and WTI sub-$90, import pressure moderates and Stage-2 → Stage-1. If oil rebounds or BOJ underwhelms, Stage-2 → Stage-3 (Shock). Week-3 maintains C as setup still fragile but peak catalyst risk (BOJ) in rear-view.
horizon_rationale.w3_w4: Week-3 C → Week-4 D reflects base case: BOJ delivers June hike, oil remains sub-$90, spread compresses modestly (180 bps), vol normalizes (FX implied 8-9%), and carry stabilizes without unwind. By early July, if no policy surprise or geopolitical flare-up, Stage-2 → Stage-1 (Pressure Building but managed). Week-4 D = unlikely unwind within 4-week horizon under base scenario. Non-monotonic path valid: peak risk weeks 2-3 around BOJ event, resolution/stabilization week 4 if catalyst passes without shock.

watch_list: June 11 US CPI (Wed 8:30 ET): if core MoM > 0.3%, USD strength could push USDJPY through 161 and force MOF hand before BOJ meeting
June 16 BOJ decision (Mon ~3am ET): 25 bp hike to 1.0% base case; watch for forward guidance on pace and JGB taper acceleration—hawkish surprise = Stage-3 trigger
JGB 10Y @ 2.8%: if breaks May 18 high, bond market stress escalates; BOJ credibility at stake, intervention/unwind risk spikes
Oil WTI sustaining sub-$88: Iran-Israel pause holding; if crude stays soft through June 16, ¥/bbl relief supports Stage-2 → Stage-1 transition
USDJPY FX vol 1M: currently ~7% (subdued); if spikes to 10%+ pre-BOJ, signals hedging demand and carry unwind positioning—watch for risk-reversal skew flip to JPY-call premium
